---
name: Refactor
about: Code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature (refactor:)
---

## Summary

<!-- What was refactored and what stays the same for users? -->

## Commits

Use **`refactor:`** or **`refactor(scope):`**, e.g. `refactor: extract token loader`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Behavior is unchanged unless explicitly called out
- [ ] Tests still pass; no accidental API or asset regressions
